report:
## Your Health Assessment

Thank you for taking the time to complete this assessment. Your answers paint a picture that we see often, and the good news is that the patterns here are very addressable.

### The Energy-Digestion Connection

Your primary concern is fatigue, and you mentioned that you crash after lunch. This is a telling combination. When energy dips predictably after meals, it often points to how the body is processing food rather than a lack of food itself. Your digestive symptoms, including straining, pain, and diarrhea, suggest that your gut may be working harder than it should, and that effort comes at a metabolic cost. Digestion is energy-intensive, and when it is not running smoothly, the body diverts resources in ways that leave you feeling drained.

### A Diet That May Be Working Against You

Looking at your typical eating pattern, we notice a theme: oatmeal, sandwiches, chips, pasta. These are all high in fiber and complex carbohydrates, which can be difficult to break down, especially if gut function is already compromised. For some people, these foods feed bacterial overgrowth in the intestines, producing byproducts that interfere with energy production. The coffee throughout the day may be compensating for flagging energy, but it can also mask the underlying signals your body is sending.

### The "Used to Feel Like Myself" Pattern

You wrote that you want to feel like yourself again, that you used to have so much energy. This tells us something important: your body knows how to feel good. It has done it before. What we are looking at is not a broken system, but a system under stress, likely from the gut-energy axis we described above. When digestion is off, it creates a cascade: nutrient absorption suffers, inflammation rises, and the body shifts into a lower gear. The fatigue you are experiencing is not a mystery. It is your body adapting to conditions that are not serving it.

---

A quiz can only reveal so much. It identifies patterns, but your situation is unique, and there is more to uncover in a real conversation. If you would like to explore what is going on and what might help, we offer a free consultation with someone on our team who understands this approach deeply. No obligation, just an opportunity to talk through your situation and see if working together makes sense. You can use the button below to book a time that works for you.
